name: Cumberland Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender container.
2. Blend until the ingredients are well combined and the orange peel is finely chopped.
3. Pour the mixture into a saucepan.
4. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and becomes bubbly.
5. Continue cooking for 1 to 2 minutes longer.
6. Serve the sauce hot or cold with meat or poultry.
Makes 1 1/2 cups.
